title: Multi-Platform Research Report + PlatformAdapter Interface Extraction
description: Research session data formats for 6 platforms, design PlatformAdapter interface, and extract Claude Code code behind the interface.

scope.in: Research report on platform data formats, PlatformAdapter interface design, refactor session-state.ts/session-scanner.ts/session-watcher.ts/claude-watcher.ts/config.ts behind the interface
scope.out: Foreman spawn adapter, pipeline adapter, actual non-Claude-Code adapter implementations, marketing/SEO work

dod.criterion: Research report covers 6 platforms with file format, discovery path, and metadata comparison matrix
PlatformAdapter interface defined in server/platform/types.ts with all 12 methods typed
ClaudeCodeAdapter implements PlatformAdapter wrapping existing code with singleton state moved to instance
All existing tests pass — zero behavior change from the refactor

tasks.title: Research report: session data formats for 6 CLI platforms
tasks.user_scenario: The team has a structured reference document comparing how Claude Code, Codex CLI, Aider, Cursor, Windsurf, and Copilot store session data.
tasks.scope: Research and document session data formats for 6 platforms.

dod.criterion: Report covers all 6 platforms with file format, discovery path, and metadata fields
Comparison matrix table shows feature parity across platforms
Claude Code section references actual code paths as baseline
Adapter implications section identifies universal vs platform-specific methods
Report is saved at the correct path and is valid markdown

tasks.title: Define PlatformAdapter interface in server/platform/types.ts
tasks.user_scenario: The codebase has a well-typed PlatformAdapter interface.

dod.criterion: server/platform/types.ts exists with PlatformAdapter interface with all 12 methods
Method signatures use platform-generic types
server/platform/index.ts exists and re-exports
npm run type-check passes with zero errors
JSDoc comments on PlatformAdapter

tasks.title: Implement ClaudeCodeAdapter wrapping existing code behind PlatformAdapter
tasks.user_scenario: All Claude-Code-specific session logic is accessible through ClaudeCodeAdapter.

dod.criterion: server/platform/claude-code.ts implementing all PlatformAdapter methods
fileStates Map and parentAgentMapCache are instance properties
aggregator.ts uses ClaudeCodeAdapter
All existing tests pass — zero behavior change
No new dependencies added to package.json

tasks.title: Add adapter integration tests and clean up dead imports
tasks.user_scenario: The PlatformAdapter refactor is tested and codebase has no dead imports.
tasks.scope: Write integration tests for ClaudeCodeAdapter. Clean up orphaned imports.

dod.criterion: Test file with at least 8 test cases
Tests construct ClaudeCodeAdapter and verify outputs
No orphaned imports
npm run type-check passes and all tests pass
